data.title: Range Impact Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Cleveland, Ohio - On March 30, 2026, Range Impact, Inc. (OTC: RNGE) announced its fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, results. The company specializes in acquiring, reclaiming, and repurposing distressed coal mine properties in Appalachia. Range Impact has been dedicated to this mission, highlighting their efforts in their latest report. For the period in review, the company shared significant data and progress made during the mentioned fiscal year, showcasing their commitment and achievements in this space.

data.title: FTI Consulting Expands Data Privacy, AI Governance Expertise in Australia
data.description: FTI Consulting, Inc. (NYSE: FCN) has revealed the selection of Kelly Henney as the Australia Leader of the Information Governance, Privacy & Security practice in the Technology segment, effective March 30, 2026. Kelly Henney will serve as a Senior Managing Director in this role.

data.title: Vale Base Metals Releases 2025 Exploration and 2026 Outlook Results; Copper Mineral Reserves and Mineral Resources Increase 6% to 53 million tonnes
data.description: In March 30, 2026, Vale Base Metals (VBM) announced plans to boost its total Mineral Reserves and Resources in Canada and Brazil by over 20% by 2027. The company's new engineering and exploration reports revealed this projected increase, marking a significant expansion in their operations. Striving for growth, VBM aims to enhance its mineral reserves and resources significantly within the next year.

data.title: REPAY Announces Agreement to Acquire KUBRA
data.description: In Atlanta, Repay Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: RPAY) disclosed a deal to acquire Kubra Data Transfer LTD. for around $372 million. The acquisition will be funded through a mix of existing cash reserves and debt financing. Kubra, a prominent provider of bill payment and customer communication management solutions, caters to major utility and government entities.

data.title: Cancer Vaccine Coalition Commits $1 Million to Try to Stop Breast Cancer Recurrence Before It Starts
data.description: A new clinical trial is set to utilize blood tests to identify cellular markers indicating cancer, along with a therapeutic vaccine aimed at halting its progression. This initiative is a collaboration between the Cancer Vaccine Coalition (CVC) and the V Foundation for Cancer Research. The trial, which will take place in Houston and New York, is scheduled to commence on March 30, 2026. The innovative approach involves leveraging blood tests to detect early signs of cancer, complemented by the administration of a therapeutic vaccine. Through this strategic partnership, the CVC and the V Foundation aim to lead the way in cancer research and treatment, potentially impacting a significant number of patients.

data.title: OR Royalties Files 2025 Year-End Disclosure Documents
data.description: OR Royalties Inc. has released its financial reports for the year ending December 31, 2025. The company, listed on both the TSX and NYSE under the symbol OR, lodged its Annual Information Form, Consolidated Annual Financial Statements, and Management's Discussion and Analysis with Canadian securities regulators. Additionally, the Annual Report on Form 40-F for the same period was submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Interested parties can access these documents on www.sedarplus.ca, www.sec.gov (for Form 40-F), or the company's website, www.ORroyalties.com.

data.title: Dr. Roxana Mehran is New American College of Cardiology President
data.description: Roxana Mehran, MD, FACC, has started her tenure as the president of the American College of Cardiology for a duration of one year. The organization boasts a membership of nearly 60,000 individuals.

data.title: Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited Announces Availability of Its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The report has been officially lodged with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and is available for viewing on the Company's official website, www.costamarebulkers.com, located within the "Investors" segment under "Annual Reports." Furthermore, the Company is identified by its trading symbol on the New York Stock Exchange as CMDB.

data.title: Attems introduces Cicinis 2024, the new vintage of its Sauvignon Blanc from Collio
data.description: Italy's renowned white wine, COLLIO GORIZIANO, from Friuli Venezia Giulia, has made its debut in global markets with the latest vintage. The wine comes from the Attems vineyard, located at the base of Monte Calvario (Podgora) in Collio. The release was noted on March 30, 2026. This vintage showcases the unique character of the wine, highlighting the region's winemaking expertise. Wine enthusiasts can now enjoy the essence of COLLIO GORIZIANO, a standout product with a history of quality and tradition.

data.title: Nakamoto Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results; Provides Update on Bitcoin Strategy
data.description: Nakamoto Inc. (NASDAQ: NAKA) based in Nashville, Tennessee, has disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company also provided an insight into its Bitcoin approach and recent progress. Nakamoto initiated its Bitcoin strategy in August 2025, aiming to establish an expandable operating enterprise utilizing a Bitcoin treasury concept. In the last half-year, the Company has been vigorously implementing its strategy, focusing on growth and stability.

(Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ), a leading quantum technology company specializing in securing critical networks worldwide, released its complete corporate update for the fiscal year 2025. This update showcased the company's advancements in various areas...

data.title: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. Appoints New Member to the Board of Directors
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Ponce Bank, N.A. and its parent company, Ponce Financial Group, Inc., announced the appointment of Marlene Cintron to serve as a Director of the Company in addition to her current role as a member of the Bank's Board of Directors. This strategic move aims to strengthen the leadership team with Cintron's expertise.
